CustomField.description: Semicolon-delimited NEPA_GIS_Layer__mdt DeveloperName keys that, when a positive GIS intersection is detected at intake, ensure the corresponding permits in Required_Permits__c are included regardless of sector/project-type match. Evaluated by NEPA_Permit_Record_Creator GIS bridge. Example: NHD; NWI_WETLANDS for water-adjacent sectors.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: GIS layer keys that trigger permits in this matrix row regardless of sector match (e.g., NHD; NWI_WETLANDS; EPA_TRIBAL_LANDS).
CustomField.label: GIS Trigger Layers
